name: 威海
description: Weihai is a beautiful coastal city in Shandong Province, known for clean beaches, fresh seafood, and historical sites. Famous as the departure point for the first Japanese attack on China in 1894 (Sino-Japanese War). Now a popular summer destination with scenic coastal drives and islands.
highlights: Liugong Island - First Sino-Japanese War site
Mountain/Sea Paradise - Theme park and beach

climate.tips: Best in summer for beaches. July-August peak swimming season. Pleasant in September. Winter cold but scenic. Avoid Golden Week October.

attractions.name: 刘公岛
attractions.description: Historic island where the First Sino-Japanese War began in 1894. Features naval base, museums, and beautiful coastal scenery.
attractions.tips: Book tickets online. Allow full morning. The history is moving.

attractions.name: 金海滩
attractions.description: Pristine 10km beach with fine golden sand, clear water, and modern resorts.
attractions.tips: Best in summer for swimming. Arrive early on weekends. Water sports available.

attractions.name: 华夏城
attractions.description: Large cultural theme park showcasing Chinese civilization with performances and architecture.
attractions.tips: Full day needed. The evening water show is spectacular.

attractions.name: 成山头
attractions.description: Easternmost point of China's mainland, known as 'First Light of the East'. Dramatic sea cliffs and sunrise views.
attractions.tips: Best for sunrise. Day trip from Weihai. The lighthouse area is iconic.

attractions.name: 海驴岛
attractions.description: Seabird island with thousands of black-tailed gulls nesting. Known as 'Seabird Kingdom'.
attractions.tips: Best in summer for birds. Bring seasickness medicine for ferry.

attractions.name: 威海公园
attractions.description: Beautiful coastal urban park with gardens, sculptures, and sea views.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset. Great for evening stroll. Iconic giant rubber duck.

attractions.name: 幸福门
attractions.description: Iconic arch gate on the waterfront, symbol of Weihai and 'happiness' of the city.
attractions.tips: Best for photos. The surrounding area is great for walking.

attractions.name: 环海路
attractions.description: Scenic coastal road stretching 30km along the coastline with beautiful sea views.
attractions.tips: Rent a car or bike. Best in morning. Multiple scenic stops.

attractions.name: 那香海
attractions.description: Clean beach area with modern facilities, art installations, and beach clubs.
attractions.tips: Best beach experience. Modern amenities. Beach club for dining.

attractions.name: 天鹅湖
attractions.description: Winter habitat for migrating swans from Siberia. Best visited December-February.
attractions.tips: Best in December-February. Hundreds of swans. Bring warm clothes.

attractions.name: 圣经山
attractions.description: Sacred Taoist mountain with ancient carved scriptures and scenic hiking trails.
attractions.tips: Day trip. Taoist sacred mountain. Ancient stone carvings unique.

attractions.name: 大乳山
attractions.description: Mother mountain shaped like a nursing breast, considered sacred in local culture.
attractions.tips: Day trip. Interesting shape. The surrounding gardens are beautiful.

attractions.name: 银滩
attractions.description: 21km pristine beach with fine white sand, considered among China's best beaches.
attractions.tips: Less crowded than Golden Beach. White sand unique. Great for walks.

attractions.name: 刘公岛博览园
attractions.description: Exhibition hall on Liugong Island showcasing naval history and Sino-Japanese War.
attractions.tips: Combine with island tour. The exhibits are informative and moving.

attractions.name: 定远舰
attractions.description: Full-scale replica of the famous Chinese battleship from the Sino-Japanese War.
attractions.tips: Combine with Liugong Island. Impressive size. Great for history buffs.

attractions.name: 鸡鸣岛
attractions.description: Secluded island with fishing village, cliffs, and beach. Famous from TV show.
attractions.tips: Book ferry in advance. The fishing village is charming.

attractions.name: 海洋公园
attractions.description: Aquarium with marine life, dolphin shows, and underwater tunnel.
attractions.tips: Great for families. Book shows in advance. Combine with beach.

attractions.name: 韩乐坊
attractions.description: Korean-themed commercial district with authentic Korean food and culture.
attractions.tips: Best evening. Authentic Korean food. Popular with locals.

attractions.name: 国际海水浴场
attractions.description: Popular beach with complete facilities, volleyball courts, and beach activities.
attractions.tips: Best equipped beach. Beach volleyball. Evening bonfires.

attractions.name: 灯塔
attractions.description: Historic lighthouse on the eastern tip of Liugong Island, offering views.
attractions.tips: Combine with island tour. Best lighting for photos.

attractions.name: 悦海公园
attractions.description: Coastal park with beach, gardens, and famous lighthouse building.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset. The lighthouse building is unique.

attractions.name: 影视城
attractions.description: Film studio and tourist destination with period architecture and shows.
attractions.tips: Great for photos. Costume rental available. Check show schedule.

attractions.name: 温泉
attractions.description: Natural hot spring resort with various pools and spa treatments.
attractions.tips: Great after beach day. Book evening for sunset views. Many pools.

attractions.name: 小石岛
attractions.description: Small island with fishing village, seafood restaurants, and sunset views.
attractions.tips: Best for sunset. Fresh seafood. Quiet island feel.

attractions.name: 成山头

attractions.name: 荣成海鲜

attractions.name: 威海老街

attractions.name: 刘公岛夜景

attractions.description: 威海传统面食。

arrival.tips: Airport 40km from city center. Airport bus (20¥) or taxi (120¥).
Station near city center. K-train from Beijing. High-speed from Qingdao.

culturalTips.title: Sino-Japanese War Heritage
culturalTips.content: Weihai is historically significant as the location where the First Sino-Japanese War (1894-95) began. Liugong Island features naval fortifications and museums commemorating this period.

culturalTips.title: Seafood Culture
culturalTips.content: Weihai is famous for fresh seafood including abalone, sea urchin, clams, and various fish. The city has strong seafood culture with many restaurants offering fresh catches daily.

culturalTips.title: Korean Influence
culturalTips.content: Due to proximity to Korea and Korean investment, Weihai has a significant Korean community, especially in the Korean Cultural Block. Authentic Korean food is readily available.

culturalTips.title: Beach Culture
culturalTips.content: Weihai has beautiful beaches including Golden Beach and Silver Beach. Summer (July-August) is peak season for swimming. The beaches are generally clean and well-maintained.

culturalTips.title: Weihai Dialect
culturalTips.content: Weihai dialect is part of Ji-Lu Mandarin with some unique words. The local accent is known for being direct. Korean influence has introduced some Korean loanwords.

culturalTips.title: Best Time to Visit
culturalTips.content: Weihai is best visited May-September for beach season. July-August is peak swimming season but crowded. June and September offer pleasant weather with fewer crowds.

culturalTips.title: Island Hopping
culturalTips.content: Weihai has several beautiful islands including Liugong Island, Chengshan Island, and Haiyu Island. Each offers unique scenery from naval history to seabird colonies.

culturalTips.title: Must-Try Dishes
culturalTips.content: Weihai specialties include: sea urchin (海胆), abalone (鲍鱼), steamed sea bass, sea intestine rice (海肠捞饭), and fresh clams.

culturalTips.title: Winter Swan Migration
culturalTips.content: Swan Lake in Rongcheng attracts hundreds of migrating swans from Siberia from December to February. This creates a unique winter tourism opportunity.

culturalTips.title: Getting Around
culturalTips.content: Weihai is best explored by car or taxi. Attractions are spread out across different districts. Didi works well for transportation. Bus network covers main areas but can be slow.

culturalTips.title: Coastal Weather
culturalTips.content: Weihai has pleasant sea breezes in summer making it cooler than inland areas. However, winter can be cold and windy. Fog is common in spring.

culturalTips.title: Evening Entertainment
culturalTips.content: Weihai has growing nightlife centered around the Korean Cultural Block, coastal zone, and beach areas. The Happiness Gate area is popular for evening walks.

culturalTips.title: Korean Cultural Block
culturalTips.content: The Korean Cultural Block (韩乐坊) is a vibrant area with Korean restaurants, shops, and entertainment. Experience authentic Korean culture without leaving China.

culturalTips.title: Local Products
culturalTips.content: Weihai is known for local products including dried seafood, Korean cosmetics, and regional specialties. The night markets offer good shopping opportunities.

culturalTips.title: Environmental Protection
culturalTips.content: Weihai has strong environmental protection policies with clean beaches and seawater. The city has received awards for urban environmental improvement.
